__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-59: marker-host auxotrophic compatibility. Construct uses a URA3 plasmid marker in a host that has a wt URA3 chromosomal locus (e.g., S288C, S. cerevisiae INVSc1 — but with the URA3 allele NOT deleted). No selection pressure exists. Expected eventual outcome (Phase 5/6): HARD block; v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-59. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (marker.host_genotype_requirement vs host.genotype substring match).
